codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses both prior scrutiny failures in the bootstrap-only `src/app.ts` path. It now clears `allowStaleLiveService` and `syncFailureReason` after a successful bootstrap sync, and it advances `hotDataRevision` both when hot data becomes visible for the first time and when a stale-visible/failure-backed bootstrap state recovers to fresh data, matching the runtime refresh semantics in `src/services/market-runtime.ts`. The added regression test exercises the stale-visible recovery case that was previously missing.

summary: Pass: commit `aaa3030` closes the remaining bootstrap-only recovery-state gap by aligning `src/app.ts` with runtime refresh semantics and adding regression coverage for stale-visible bootstrap recovery. I reviewed the fix transcript skeleton, the new diff, and both prior failed-feature diffs/reviews; the previously blocking revision-bump and stale-live-flag cleanup issues are now addressed.
